title: No slip even in hot yoga
review_text: Used this in a 95 degree hot yoga class. Hands and feet stayed planted. Alignment lines are subtle but really helpful. No chemical smell out of the box.

title: Heavy but worth it
review_text: A bit heavy to carry to the studio compared to travel mats. But the 6mm thickness is so much more comfortable on hard floors. Edges curled slightly when new but flattened after a week.
